_comment: OrchestrationEngine JSON Specification — OpenCode Ecosystem v1.0.0
name: OrchestrationEngine
description: Central dispatch and coordination layer for the OpenCode ecosystem. Routes tasks to 128 registered agents across 155 skills and 46 MCP servers. Provides load-balanced, fault-tolerant, multi-reasoning-aware task orchestration with full SROI telemetry integration.

contracts.name: dispatchTask
contracts.description: Validates and dispatches a task request to the optimal available agent. Core routing contract of the orchestration layer.
preconditions: req.task_id is a valid UUID v4 string
req.task_id does NOT already exist in active_task_ids registry
req.priority is an integer in range [1, 10]
req.timeout_ms is in range [100, 3600000] if provided
At least one agent exists with: health_status='healthy' AND skills.includes(req.skill_required) AND load < concurrency_slots
postconditions: req.task_id is added to active_task_ids registry
A TaskRecord with status='running' is created
selected_agent.load is incremented by 1
A 'task_dispatched' telemetry event is emitted with task_id and agent_id
task_record.started_at is set to current UTC timestamp
invariants: OE-I1: |active_dispatches| <= SUM(agent.concurrency_slots) for all healthy agents
OE-I2: Every dispatched task has a corresponding TaskRecord
OE-I5: All errors carry error_code, component_id, task_id, timestamp, message

error_cases.condition: No healthy agent has the required skill

contracts.name: selectAgent
contracts.description: Selects the optimal agent for a given skill using multi-factor scoring: available capacity, health score, and skill affinity.
preconditions: skill_required is a valid SkillId present in skill_registry
candidate_agents (healthy agents with required skill) is non-empty
postconditions: Returns exactly one AgentId
Returned agent has health_status='healthy'
Returned agent has skills.includes(skill_required)=true
Returned agent has load < concurrency_slots
Score maximization: score = (concurrency_slots - load) * health_score * skill_affinity
Tiebreak: agent with lowest task_count_total is selected
invariants: OE-I3: Routing table is atomically read — no partial state visible

contracts.name: handleAgentFailure
contracts.description: Fault tolerance contract: retries task on failure up to MAX_RETRIES, then permanently fails the task with a structured error.
preconditions: task_record with task_id exists in active_task_ids
agent_id is registered in the agent registry
postconditions: IF retry_count < 5: task_record.status = 'retrying', retry_count incremented, task re-dispatched to different agent
IF retry_count >= 5: task_record.status = 'failed', error record written with MAX_RETRIES_EXCEEDED
A telemetry event ('task_retried' or 'task_failed_permanently') is emitted
Failed agent is marked for health re-evaluation
invariants: OE-I2: TaskRecord always reflects current status
OE-I5: Error record carries all required fields

contracts.name: completeTask
contracts.description: Marks a running task as successfully completed, releases agent load, and optionally triggers SROI snapshot attachment.
postconditions: task_record.status = 'succeeded'
task_record.completed_at = NOW()
assigned_agent.load decremented by 1
If require_sroi=true: sroi_snapshot attached to DispatchResult
Telemetry event 'task_completed' emitted
invariants: OE-I1: Agent load cannot go below 0

contracts.name: cancelTask
contracts.description: Cancels a pending or running task, freeing agent resources and updating the task registry.
postconditions: task_record.status = 'cancelled'
If task was running: assigned_agent.load decremented by 1
Telemetry event 'task_cancelled' emitted with reason
invariants: OE-I1: System load constraints maintained after cancellation

contracts.name: refreshRoutingTable
contracts.description: Atomically rebuilds the agent routing table based on current agent health, skills, and load metrics.
preconditions: Routing table write lock is acquired (no concurrent refresh)
postconditions: Routing table contains only agents with health_status='healthy'
Each entry maps skill_id to sorted list of eligible agents by score
Write lock is released
Telemetry event 'routing_table_refreshed' emitted with agent count
invariants: OE-I3: Table update is atomic — no partial state is visible during refresh

error_cases.condition: Another refresh is already in progress
